intents.text: Staged vs worktree mismatch: calculatePromptAttributionAtStart reads git index but WriteTemporary captures worktree, undercounting user contributions.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: unstaged changes are captured in the shadow branch but not counted in PromptAttributions

intents.text: Explain fully how unstaged changes are handled when the manual commit is done.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: how we handle unstaged changes when the manual commit is done

intents.text: User edits before first prompt are never captured because CheckpointCount>0 skips first checkpoint and no shadow branch causes early return, misattributing edits to agent.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: User edits made after the base commit but before the first prompt are never captured

intents.text: Inner CalculatePromptAttribution can handle nil checkpoint trees via baseTree fallback, but callers prevent this logic from executing.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: inner CalculatePromptAttribution function can handle nil checkpoint trees

intents.text: getAllChangedFilesBetweenTrees reads every file's content twice — once building fileSet and again filtering — causing performance issues for large repos.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: reads the content of every file in both trees twice

intents.text: Can we use git file hashes to detect diffs instead of reading full file contents?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: can't we get a hash from git for each file and check like this for diff
